title: Reading Comprehension: Texts and Inference
description: Build B1 reading skills across real-world text types — articles, stories, emails and notices — learning to identify main ideas, locate specific details, make basic inferences, and work out vocabulary meaning from context.
sources: CEFR B1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Cambridge English B1 Preliminary Handbook for Teachers (reading task types and strategies)
